visual_description: In a dimly lit, cluttered room, three men stand in a line, all pointing wands forward in a defensive or threatening posture. The central figure, a man with platinum blonde hair, is the focus. He wears a black high-collared coat and has a determined, slightly menacing expression as he aims his wand. To his left, a man with short dark hair and a black shirt mirrors the central figure's stance, also aiming his wand. To the right, another man with a shaved head and a dark suit jacket holds his wand up, his expression serious and focused. The background is dark and filled with indistinct, shadowy objects, suggesting a storage room or a dark, old building. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. At the bottom of the frame, Chinese subtitles appear, which change throughout the clip. The camera remains stationary, holding a medium shot of the three men. A male voice speaks in a low, slightly raspy, and contemplative tone. He begins with a hesitant and thoughtful delivery, saying, "It's awful, but it's... not the same."
